titles.title: Isn't the Name of Jesus Wonderful

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Isn't the name of Jesus wonderful? Isn't the name of Jesus wonderful? All the world can come to Him To have their sins removed. Isn't the name of Jesus wonderful?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Isn't the name of Jesus beautiful? Isn't the name of Jesus beautiful? Son of God and one of us. Lover of our souls. Isn't the name of Jesus beautiful?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Eternal king You will reign forever, And we will sing the glory of Your name. Be lifted high for all the world to see: Your name is all they need. Your name is all we need.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Isn't the name of Jesus Powerful? Isn't the name of Jesus Powerful? Chains are broken when it's spoken, Every knee must bow. Isn't the name of Jesus Powerful?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is freedom in the name. There's healing in the name. There is power in the name. Salvation in the name. There is life in the name. There is no other name But Jesus!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Isn't the name of Jesus all we need? Isn't the name of Jesus all we need? He's the way the truth the Life The only way to God. Isn't the Name oft Jesus all de need?
